title: viola odorata subsp. dehnhardtii
intro: Viola odorata subsp. dehnhardtii, also known as Sweet-scented Pansy or Dehnhardt's Pansy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the violet family (Violaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viola odorata subsp. dehnhardtii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, and is also used as a flavoring agent in some culinary applications.
